hooks.command: fp=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$fp" == *.ts || "$fp" == *.tsx ]]; then cd /Users/takumiishikawa/work/shogi-web && npx eslint --fix "$fp" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

cd /Users/takumiishikawa/work/shogi-web && echo '--- typecheck ---' && npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo '--- lint ---' && npm run lint 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo '--- tests ---' && npx vitest run 2>&1 | tail -10 && echo '--- console.log check ---' && git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l 'console\.log' 2>/dev/null || echo 'none'
